race.description: Footts Swan Hill Demolition Group Hcp (Bm56)
race.comment: HYDROGEN POWER (1) has been mixing his form of late, but must always be respected here on the home deck, where he has had seven starts for five top-three finishes. Get a huge chance to improve those stats from the draw. PENDANTE (9) was in the money two starts back at Kilmore but couldn't back it up last time when eighth, beaten 3.5 lengths, at Echuca over 1612m. That was the first plain run of the prep, though, and the nice gate presents a chance to return to her best. WATT ON EARTH (2) disappointed last time when fifth over 1612m at Echuca after a close second at Ararat the run prior. Better suited at this shorter trip so should prove tough to beat. CATCH A BREAK (4) ran second last start, albeit beaten over 7 lengths, but draws to play a role.
